title: About Me
description: A skilled Software Engineer with strong experience in automation, software development, and IT infrastructure. Proven ability to deliver solutions that enhance productivity and efficiency, while overseeing major infrastructure deployments and building mobile, desktop, and web applications. Currently serving as an Application Development Senior Specialist at Vodafone Oman, focused on optimizing processes and improving business outcomes through innovative development and effective problem-solving.

services.title: IT Automation
services.description: Implementing automated solutions to increase efficiency and reduce costs using Python, PowerShell, and Bash scripting.

services.title: App Development
services.description: Creating cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and native Android apps with Java.

services.title: IT Infrastructure
services.description: Managing servers, hypervisors, containers, and web servers including Linux, Windows Server, and virtualization technologies.

services.title: Test Automation
services.description: Automating testing processes for mobile apps, websites, and APIs using Appium, Selenium, and JMeter.
